_comment: Per-section TTS plan. Sections are spoken sequentially; per-section start_ms is the absolute start time within the rendered Remotion composition (matches scenario timing in timing-data.json). Generator infers stop time from the next section's start_ms. The Owner sections (A, I, K) overlay the B-roll clips; the others overlay the screen-capture scenarios.

sections.speaker: owner
sections.text: Yesterday I threw out forty croissants. I needed something that would just tell me how many to bake.

sections.speaker: vo
sections.text: BakerySense — an offline-first decision copilot, powered by Gemma 4.

sections.speaker: vo
sections.text: Sign in with the bakery's tenant slug, email, and password. We use ES256 JWT and Argon2id, but that's plumbing. The interesting part is what comes next.

sections.speaker: vo
sections.text: Here's the sales history we loaded — per SKU, per branch, per day. The forecaster trains on this. No black box; the operator can see exactly what the model has seen.

sections.speaker: vo
sections.text: The predictor itself: LightGBM gradient-boosted trees, seven quantile heads, thirteen plain-language features. It runs in pure TypeScript inside a Cloudflare Worker — no Python at request time. Retrain on actuals, hot-swapped via a KV pointer.

sections.speaker: vo
sections.text: Today's bake plan. Each row is a SKU; the quantity is newsvendor-picked from the quantile forecast. Switch branches — same model, completely different demand shape. The numbers come from the data, not from intuition.

sections.speaker: vo
sections.text: Open a SKU. The quantile band shows where demand is likely to land; the driver bars show why.

sections.speaker: vo
sections.text: Click Ask Gemma why. The question is prefilled and sent to Gemma 4. It calls the forecaster, reads the SHAP-style drivers, and grounds its answer in the numbers.

sections.speaker: owner
sections.text: At five PM I take one photo. It counts what is left.

sections.speaker: vo
sections.text: The same Gemma 4 vision-counts the display case and suggests markdowns.

sections.speaker: vo
sections.text: Sign out. Refresh-token tombstones and JWKS rotation handle the rest.

sections.speaker: owner
sections.text: By month two, the model knows my bakery better than I do.
